docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-24 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-3-2025 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (2-27-2023) IN COURT FOR $6848.48 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN 30 PAYMENTS. THE 1ST PAYMENT OF $225 TO BE PAID ON APRIL 1ST, 2023, AND SUBSEQUENT PAYMENTS ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER. THE 30TH PAYMENT IS TO BE $323.48. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED ON FEB-3-25 AT 5:30 P.M. IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED ONE LAST TIME TO OCT-6-25, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DOLORES BASTIAN DALTON; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$345.00) SERVED JAN-24-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MECHETTI, WAYNE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-28-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FRED COHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAYNE MECHETTI IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR $6848.48 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN 30 PAYMENTS. THE 1ST PAYMENT OF $225 TO BE PAID ON APRIL 1ST AND SUBSEQUENT PAYMENTS ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER. THE 30TH PAYMENT IS TO BE $323.48. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE AUGUST 28TH 2023 HEARING AT 3:30 P.M. IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. IF NO APPEARANCES AT ANY OF THE PROGRESS REPORT DATES, THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 6-MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL AFTER THE RESOLVE DATE OF OCTOBER 1ST 2025, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
